actuarial_rationale: GLM with higher df splines is fully transparent. Actuaries often use degree 4-6 splines. This is within standard practice and auditable. No interactions = no sparse cell risk.
description: GLM baseline with increased spline degrees (df=6 vs df=5). Conservative enhancement - higher flexibility in continuous terms only, no interactions that could cause instability.
hypothesis: The LightGBM advantage appears structural. Try max GLM flexibility via higher spline df to get as close as possible. This tests whether GLM can get within 1% of LightGBM on ranking.
